records.question: Which employees named Todd H. Wilson, born on 1966-10-19, hired on 1990-11-6, have the job code CUST?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.emp_num FROM employee
WHERE employee.emp_hiredate = '1990-11-6' AND employee.emp_initial = 'H' AND employee.emp_lname = 'Wilson' AND employee.emp_dob = '1966-10-19' AND employee.emp_fname = 'Todd' AND employee.emp_jobcode = 'CUST'
records.pred_sql: SELECT EMP_NUM FROM EMPLOYEE WHERE EMP_FNAME = 'Todd' AND EMP_INITIAL = 'H' AND EMP_LNAME = 'Wilson' AND EMP_DOB = '1966-10-19' AND EMP_HIREDATE = '1990-11-6' AND EMP_JOBCODE = 'CUST'

records.question: Which employees with the initial B, hired on 1978-8-1, have the job code PROF and work in the Accounting department within the BUS school?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.emp_num FROM employee
JOIN department ON employee.emp_num = department.emp_num
WHERE employee.emp_initial = 'B' AND department.dept_name = 'Accounting' AND department.school_code = 'BUS' AND employee.emp_jobcode = 'PROF' AND employee.emp_hiredate = '1978-8-1'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT E.EMP_NUM
FROM EMPLOYEE E
JOIN PROFESSOR P ON E.EMP_NUM = P.EMP_NUM
JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON P.DEPT_CODE = D.DEPT_CODE
WHERE E.EMP_INITIAL = 'B'
  AND DATE(E.EMP_HIREDATE) = '1978-08-01'
  AND E.EMP_JOBCODE = 'PROF'
  AND D.DEPT_NAME = 'Accounting'
  AND D.SCHOOL_CODE = 'BUS'

records.question: I'm looking for Gerald Graztevski, born on 1939-3-18, with middle initial B, who teaches in classroom KLR211 and works in the BUS school with department extension 3119. Who is this employee?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.emp_num FROM employee
JOIN class ON employee.emp_num = class.prof_num
JOIN department ON employee.emp_num = department.emp_num
WHERE employee.emp_initial = 'B' AND department.school_code = 'BUS' AND class.class_room = 'KLR211' AND employee.emp_fname = 'Gerald' AND employee.emp_lname = 'Graztevski' AND employee.emp_dob = '1939-3-18' AND department.dept_extension = '3119'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT EMPLOYEE.EMP_NUM
FROM EMPLOYEE
JOIN PROFESSOR ON EMPLOYEE.EMP_NUM = PROFESSOR.EMP_NUM
JOIN DEPARTMENT ON PROFESSOR.DEPT_CODE = DEPARTMENT.DEPT_CODE
JOIN CLASS ON EMPLOYEE.EMP_NUM = CLASS.PROF_NUM
WHERE EMPLOYEE.EMP_FNAME = 'Gerald'
  AND EMPLOYEE.EMP_LNAME = 'Graztevski'
  AND EMPLOYEE.EMP_INITIAL = 'B'
  AND DATE(EMPLOYEE.EMP_DOB) = '1939-03-18'
  AND CLASS.CLASS_ROOM = 'KLR211'
  AND DEPARTMENT.SCHOOL_CODE = 'BUS'
  AND DEPARTMENT.DEPT_EXTENSION = '3119'

records.question: Which employees named Ralph F Matler, born on 1973-12-2 with job code PROF, have a professor record where the highest degree is MBA and the extension is 2851?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.emp_num FROM employee
JOIN professor ON employee.emp_num = professor.emp_num
WHERE professor.prof_high_degree = 'MBA' AND employee.emp_dob = '1973-12-2' AND employee.emp_fname = 'Ralph' AND employee.emp_initial = 'F' AND professor.prof_extension = '2851' AND employee.emp_lname = 'Matler' AND employee.emp_jobcode = 'PROF'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT EMPLOYEE.EMP_NUM
FROM EMPLOYEE
JOIN PROFESSOR ON EMPLOYEE.EMP_NUM = PROFESSOR.EMP_NUM
WHERE EMPLOYEE.EMP_FNAME = 'Ralph'
  AND EMPLOYEE.EMP_LNAME = 'Matler'
  AND EMPLOYEE.EMP_INITIAL = 'F'
  AND DATE(EMPLOYEE.EMP_DOB) = '1973-12-02'
  AND EMPLOYEE.EMP_JOBCODE = 'PROF'
  AND PROFESSOR.PROF_HIGH_DEGREE = 'MBA'
  AND PROFESSOR.PROF_EXTENSION = '2851'

records.question: Which employees with the initial B are involved in both classes and departments?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.emp_num FROM employee
JOIN class ON employee.emp_num = class.prof_num
JOIN department ON employee.emp_num = department.emp_num
WHERE employee.emp_initial = 'B'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT EMP_NUM
FROM EMPLOYEE
WHERE EMP_INITIAL = 'B'
  AND EMP_NUM IN (SELECT PROF_NUM FROM CLASS WHERE PROF_NUM IS NOT NULL)
  AND EMP_NUM IN (SELECT EMP_NUM FROM DEPARTMENT WHERE EMP_NUM IS NOT NULL)

records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.emp_num FROM employee
JOIN class ON employee.emp_num = class.prof_num
JOIN department ON employee.emp_num = department.emp_num
WHERE employee.emp_fname = 'Gerald' AND department.dept_name = 'Accounting' AND employee.emp_hiredate = '1978-8-1' AND department.school_code = 'BUS' AND employee.emp_lname = 'Graztevski'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT EMPLOYEE.EMP_NUM
FROM EMPLOYEE
JOIN PROFESSOR ON EMPLOYEE.EMP_NUM = PROFESSOR.EMP_NUM
JOIN DEPARTMENT ON PROFESSOR.DEPT_CODE = DEPARTMENT.DEPT_CODE
JOIN CLASS ON EMPLOYEE.EMP_NUM = CLASS.PROF_NUM
WHERE EMPLOYEE.EMP_FNAME = 'Gerald'
  AND EMPLOYEE.EMP_LNAME = 'Graztevski'

  AND DEPARTMENT.SCHOOL_CODE = 'BUS'
